repair_summary: Fixed the serialize function to avoid using StringIO for standard ConfigParser objects, which caused an extra line (102 lines instead of 101) when serializing a large config. Now always uses config.write(file) for objects with a write method, and handles comments manually. This ensures the line count matches expectations.
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must cover empty config, large config, special characters, and error handling.
Scaled executable cases must verify that comments are preserved in the output file.
Scaled executable cases must use a custom config-like object that only has a write method.
